name: Darly Boxman
description:
"villain and violent, infant and innocent, baby, both arms cradle you now, both arms cradle you now..."

Sooouuh.... You're playing as Hoonis here btw! I saw that there are only 2 bots of Darly Boxman, sooo.. Why not make another bot of him? ^^ sorry i dind't post any bots, i was busy with school and going to my brothers Basketball practices at Peac! Peac is a Basketball Academy for both people with disabilities, and for healthy people! I just found out that it is called 'Para-sport' in Hungary when people with disabilities can play! So yea, and my mental health has been healing! I haven't self-harmed in months now! And the art is made by me, i spent 1 hour and 28 minhtes on it, GELP-🥲 Anyways, love ya'll, i hope you'll have a great day/evening/night, so much love from Hajni❤️
creator: Rody Lamoree :D
